title: Will Rebuild be released in US theaters
display_title: Will Rebuild be released in US theaters
wikitext:
[]: Will Rebuild be released in US theaters? Post by V » Fri Nov 02, 2007 6:29 pm Even as a limited release in select cities? Will Rebuild be released in the US, like how Spirited Away was? Do we have any word on this?

[]: Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Fri Nov 02, 2007 6:32 pm There's a thread about this somewhere. Someone said it would be shown at some film festival on the left coast. But who has the U.S./North America rights to Webuild anyway?

[]: Post by V » Fri Nov 02, 2007 6:38 pm unknown who has the rights (sigh) and the lion's share of the admins are in the northeast USA....

[]: Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Fri Nov 02, 2007 7:18 pm I despise the US for many reasons but I;m pretty sure they'll show it in the US. That is, when the second movie comes out. Poor US...yet they call themselves the most technological country in the world yet they don't do anything for clime change. *Sigh* Anyway, yeah, I'm pretty sure it'll be shown there, since the US gets everything. Also, you should go to the ADV website. When LAEM comes out, it's going to be shown in America as well, since they hold full worldwide rights. It also says the Rebuild movies would be shown in the USA in early 2008 or mid-2008.

[]: Post by V » Fri Nov 02, 2007 7:20 pm I will go to the ADV website: ADV isn't just showing the live action series, they're apparently footing the bill to co-produce it.

[]: Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Fri Nov 02, 2007 7:22 pm Hmm..never knew that. But, then, there's always many surprises when it comes to the world of Evangelion.

[]: Post by BrikHaus » Fri Nov 02, 2007 7:44 pm V wrote: (sigh) and the lion's share of the admins are in the northeast USA....

[]: Post by Reichu » Fri Nov 02, 2007 7:57 pm THE Hal E. Burton 9000 wrote: There's a thread about this somewhere.
